# BEAvailability.Context.webBrowser

**Case**

The app is a web browser.

## Declaration

```swift
case webBrowser
```

## Discussion

To use this value with [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEAvailability/isEligible(for:completionHandler:)], your app needs to be a web browser.
title: BEAvailability.Context.webBrowser
